description: The GaussianSplatRenderer component renders Gaussian Splats into the world.

fields.SizeScale: How much to scale up or down the gaussian splat.
fields.OpacityScale: How transparent the Gaussian Splat is.
fields.MaxSHOrder: The max Spherical Harmonics level to render with.
fields.SphericalHarmonicsOnly: Whether to use only Spherical Harmonics.
